# function: assertion

Creates an uptime assertion. The root operation can be any of the other operation functions that starts with `op_`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "operand" {
  value = provider::sentry::assertion(
    provider::sentry::op_and(
      provider::sentry::op_status_code_check("greater_than", 199),
      provider::sentry::op_status_code_check("less_than", 300),
    ),
  )
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
assertion(root string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `root` (String) The root operation of the assertion.
